articles.author: Reuters
articles.title: Scientists dig up Southeast Asia’s largest dinosaur - NBC News
articles.description: Along a meandering river in a warm and arid region that is now Thailand roughly 113 million years ago, a plant-eating behemoth almost 90 feet long browsed on the treetops without much fear of predators due to its sheer size.
